diffs.diff:
--- a/model.py
+++ b/model.py
@@ -13,8 +13,11 @@
         # Remove the final classification layer

         self.backbone.fc = nn.Identity()

         

-        # Get feature channels from different layers

-        self.layer0 = nn.Sequential(self.backbone.conv1, self.backbone.bn1, self.backbone.relu, self.backbone.maxpool)

+        # Extract components for flexible layer construction

+        self.conv1 = self.backbone.conv1

+        self.bn1 = self.backbone.bn1

+        self.relu = self.backbone.relu

+        self.maxpool = self.backbone.maxpool

         self.layer1 = self.backbone.layer1

         self.layer2 = self.backbone.layer2

         self.layer3 = self.backbone.layer3

@@ -41,8 +44,8 @@
     

     def forward(self, x):

         # Encoder path

-        x0 = self.layer0(x)  # [batch, 64, H/4, W/4]

-        x1 = self.layer1(x0)  # [batch, 256, H/4, W/4]

+        x0 = self.relu(self.bn1(self.conv1(x)))  # [batch, 64, H/2, W/2] - after conv1 and relu

+        x1 = self.layer1(self.maxpool(x0))  # [batch, 256, H/4, W/4] - maxpool applied here

         x2 = self.layer2(x1)  # [batch, 512, H/8, W/8]

         x3 = self.layer3(x2)  # [batch, 1024, H/16, W/16]

         x4 = self.layer4(x3)  # [batch, 2048, H/32, W/32]
